name: Boardwalk Funding, LLC
description_short: Austin-based hard money lender specializing in fix-and-flip and new construction loans for Texas real estate investors with 1-year terms and competitive rates.
description_long:
Boardwalk Funding, LLC is a boutique hard money lender headquartered in Austin, Texas, focused exclusively on serving real estate investors throughout the state. The company positions itself as a local financing partner committed to supporting investors' real estate ventures with dependable capital and fast approval processes. Their boutique model emphasizes personalized service and local expertise in the Texas real estate market.

The company offers two primary loan products: Fix & Flip loans and New Construction loans. Fix & Flip loans carry 1-year terms at 11.00%-12.75% rates with 2.00-2.75 points, designed for investors purchasing and renovating properties. New Construction loans offer 1-year terms at 11.25%-12.95% rates with 2.50-3.00 points. Both products are structured for real estate investors rather than traditional homebuyers, reflecting hard money lending's typical use case of short-term project financing with faster underwriting than conventional mortgages.

Boardwalk Funding differentiates itself through its exclusive focus on Texas investors, local Austin-based operations, and stated commitment to investor success. The company emphasizes fast, dependable lending as a core value proposition. Their direct contact method (phone/text line) suggests accessibility and quick decision-making capability typical of hard money lenders.

Prospective borrowers should understand that hard money lending carries significantly higher rates and points than conventional mortgages—these rates reflect the short-term, higher-risk nature of fix-and-flip and construction projects. The 1-year terms require clear exit strategies (sale, refinance, or project completion). This product is not suitable for primary home purchases or traditional mortgage needs. The company's exclusive Texas focus also limits geographic availability.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Specializes in fix-and-flip financing with clear, published rates (11.00%-12.75%) and points (2.00-2.75)
Local Austin-based lender with stated expertise and commitment to Texas real estate investors
Fast approval and funding process implicit in hard money lending model, enabling quick project launches
Boutique lender structure allows personalized attention compared to large institutional lenders
Offers both fix-and-flip and new construction financing, providing flexibility across investor project types
1-year terms are standard for fix-and-flip projects, aligning loan duration with typical investor exit timelines
Direct phone/text contact (512)-699-3649 provides immediate access to loan officers
cons: Rates of 11.00%-12.75% are substantially higher than conventional mortgages (typically 6-8%), significantly increasing project costs
Points of 2.00-3.00 add thousands in upfront costs that reduce investor net proceeds
1-year terms require investors to have concrete exit strategies; projects delayed beyond 1 year face refinancing challenges
Hard money loans typically require 20-30% down payment, creating significant capital requirements not detailed on website
Exclusive Texas focus limits access for investors operating in other states; no national lending mentioned
best_for: Texas real estate investors executing fix-and-flip projects with clear timelines and exit strategies
New construction developers needing short-term project financing before permanent financing or sale
Investors unable to qualify for conventional mortgages due to credit, timeline, or property condition issues
Real estate investors requiring fast capital deployment for time-sensitive acquisition and renovation opportunities
diagnosis: Boardwalk Funding is best suited for active Texas real estate investors executing fix-and-flip or new construction projects who need fast capital and have clear project timelines and exit strategies. The critical caveat is that hard money loans carry rates substantially higher than conventional mortgages (11-13% vs. 6-8%) and upfront point fees, making them viable only when conventional financing is unavailable or when project speed justifies the premium cost—not for owner-occupied home purchases or long-term holds.
services: Hard money lending for real estate investors
Fast loan approval and funding processes
Local Austin-based lending with Texas-wide service area
Points-based loan structure (2.00-3.00 points depending on product)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2503 E Cesar Chavez St, Austin, TX 78702
